hooks.command: PLUGIN_VERSION='3.0.0' && echo '=== MULTI-AGENT METHODOLOGY ===' && found_mama=0 && needs_upgrade=0 && for dir in .mcc .mcc-*; do if [ -d "$dir" ] && [ -f "$dir/architect_state.md" ]; then found_mama=1; scope=$(echo "$dir" | sed 's/^\.mcc-//; s/^\.mcc$//'); if [ -n "$scope" ]; then echo "MAMA scope: $scope (state in $dir/)"; else echo "MAMA state: $dir/"; fi; state_ver=$(sed 's/\*//g' "$dir/architect_state.md" 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'MAMA Version:\s*\K[0-9.]+'); if [ -n "$state_ver" ]; then if [ "$state_ver" != "$PLUGIN_VERSION" ]; then echo "Version: $state_ver (plugin is $PLUGIN_VERSION — run /mama:upgrade)"; needs_upgrade=1; fi; else echo 'Version: not stamped (run /mama:upgrade)'; needs_upgrade=1; fi; if [ -f "$dir/sprint_log.md" ]; then last_sprint=$(grep -oP 'Sprint \K\d+' "$dir/sprint_log.md" 2>/dev/null | tail -1); if [ -n "$last_sprint" ]; then echo "Last recorded sprint: $last_sprint"; fi; fi; fi; done && for dir in .mcc .mcc-*; do if [ -d "$dir" ] && [ -f "$dir/architect_state.md" ] && [ $found_mama -eq 0 ]; then echo "Found MAM state at $dir/ — run /mama:upgrade to migrate to MAMA"; needs_upgrade=1; found_mama=1; fi; done && if [ $found_mama -eq 0 ]; then if [ -f CLAUDE.md ]; then has_old_artifacts=$(ls docs/implementation_*sprint*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$has_old_artifacts" ]; then echo 'IN-FLIGHT PROJECT with pre-2.0.0 artifacts — run /mama:upgrade'; needs_upgrade=1; else sprint=$(grep -oP 'Current Sprint.*?\K\d+' CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$sprint" ]; then echo "IN-FLIGHT PROJECT - Sprint $sprint (no .mcc/ state dir — run /mama:upgrade)"; needs_upgrade=1; else highest=$(ls docs/sprint/*/implementation_plan.md 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'sprint/\K\d+' | sort -n | tail -1); if [ -n "$highest" ]; then echo "IN-FLIGHT PROJECT - Detected Sprint $highest artifacts (no .mcc/ state dir — run /mama:upgrade)"; needs_upgrade=1; else echo 'PROJECT INITIALIZED - No sprints started yet'; fi; fi; fi; else echo 'NEW PROJECT - No CLAUDE.md found'; echo 'Run /mama:arch-init to get started'; fi; fi && echo 'Sprint artifacts:' && (ls -1d docs/sprint/*/implementation_plan.md docs/*/sprint/*/implementation_plan.md 2>/dev/null | head -6 || ls -1 docs/implementation_*sprint*.md 2>/dev/null | head -6 || echo '  (none)') && echo '---' && echo 'Tell me if this is wrong: "We are in sprint X"'
